CREATE TABLE test_map (key Array(String), value Array(UInt32));
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, description String);
WITH ['first', 'second', 'third'] AS keys, [10, 20, 30] AS values SELECT mapFromArrays(keys, values) AS result;
SELECT mapFromArrays(['x', 'y'], [map('a', 1), map('b', 2)]) AS result_map FROM another_table;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_map (keys Array(String), values Array(UInt32));
WITH (SELECT mapFromArrays(keys, values) FROM temp_map) AS generated_map SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE id = generated_map['keyA'];
SELECT mapFromArrays([1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 6]) AS number_map WHERE number_map[1] > 3;
SELECT mapFromArrays(['apple', 'banana', 'cherry'], [2, 3, 4]) AS fruit_map WHERE length(fruit_map) = 3;
